textByHash.178037ec88dbf85060e01a5e80847c2d8519af6a: That will cost you 500 coins, thief.
textByHash.4f793e912c26474cf864a693e52c291abc1b4aa4: If you want out, it will cost you 500 coins, thief.
textByHash.5025e5ea47efe1b8cbf95484e203c115a235dd3b: Can't say, all very secret. You should get out of here. I am not supposed to talk while I guard.
textByHash.fa68dd2ac1231cfb14c4fc1363d709489094dff6: You never relax with these people, but it's a good career for a young man.
textByHash.e37915740432069f3c712ccd4302e358d0587285: Thanks, I appreciate that. Talking on duty can be punishable by having your mouth stitched up. These are tough people, no mistake.
